plan_under_test: Make the default asset-reference gate usable when generated companion outputs are absent by deriving manifest coverage from question_bank.json in memory and downgrading absent downstream exports to warnings.
tests_added_or_changed: Added test_asset_reference_validation_derives_missing_manifest_and_warns_on_optional_inputs. The fixture writes only question_bank.json plus canonical question and mark-scheme PNG files, then asserts validation succeeds with no errors, manifest_source derived_from_question_bank, two manifest assets, and five missing_optional_validation_input warnings.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, validate_asset_references should report missing_validation_input errors for the absent asset manifest, Asterion exports, and topic-routing sidecar, so the new test should fail.
what_passing_proves: The validator can perform question-bank and canonical-path checks without writing generated companion outputs.
A missing persisted manifest is visible as a warning and summary source rather than hidden.
Provided stale manifests still fail through the iteration-1 regression test.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not prove missing Asterion exports are acceptable for release promotion.
It does not validate semantic PNG/question alignment.
It does not persist or repair output/json/asset_manifest.v1.json.
risk_of_bad_tests: Moderate. The test intentionally changes missing generated sidecars from hard errors to warnings, so the implementation must keep question_bank.json required and keep malformed provided files as errors.
